our services

All services we offer

EMERGENCY STORM AND WATER DAMAGE REPAIRS

ROOF
RESTORATION

ROOF GUTTER REPAIR AND CLEANING

SKYLIGHT REPAIRS & REPLACEMENTS

RE-POINTING & REBEDDING RIDGES & GABLES

REPAIRING OR REPLACING FLASHINGS

WATERPROOFING

TILE
REPLACEMENT

REPAIRING WATER LEAKS

REPAIRING AND REPLACING VALLEYS

About us

Need roofing? Contact us today!

Sydney Roofing Specialists serves as a leading roofing company in the Sydney metropolitan and surrounding areas. We’re a team of fully qualified, licensed and insured professionals who tackle everything from complex large projects to smaller scale jobs.

Fuelled by our commitment to excellence, we go the extra mile to make sure clients are completely satisfied with our work. Call us today to receive a quotation.

  • Sydney’s most affordable roofing specialists
  • The best customer service in the business
  • The highest quality products
Get a quote
Testimonials

Why People are Choosing us for Their roofs

” We are very happy with the work from the team at Sydney Roofing Specialists and highly recommend. Michael visited shortly after my initial call, photographed the problems on the roof that were causing our leak and quoted straight away. We accepted the quote and he returned within a week, carried out all the work quickly & professionally and showed us the photos of the work completed. Thank you!”

Dylan Hamilton-Foster

Sydney, NSW

“Called Michael at 9:30pm on a Wednesday night as a storm hit and left me with a leak in the roof in the main living room, Michael assured me not to worry and that he will be there within 30 minutes, got there and fixed the roof immediately and saved me a fortune! Can not recommend Michael and the team enough!”

Barry Matthews

Sydney, NSW

“Michael and his team were professional, knowledgeable and friendly right from the beginning. We are very pleased with the roof repair completed and would definitely recommend them to others.”

Marianthe Ranieri

Sydney, NSW

main REASON Customers CHOOSE US

Our Promise

Quality Workmanship

At Sydney Roofing Specialists, we are dedicated to providing top-notch roofing services and materials, ensuring a sturdy and dependable roof for your home.

Timely Completion

We strive to complete each project efficiently while adhering to the highest safety and cleanliness standards. Trust SRS for a prompt and hassle-free roofing experience.

Customer Satisfaction

Our goal is to consistently meet and surpass customer expectations through excellent service, clear communication, and reasonable pricing.

FAQ

let’s build something together

Our professional roofing team consists of skilled and seasoned experts who have the capability to tackle any roofing project, regardless of its size. We use only premium-grade materials and stay abreast of the latest industry methods to guarantee that your roof is durable. Our team takes great pride in their work, which reflects in the quality of the final product.

Contact us

The expenses incurred for roof repair vary due to multiple factors such as the extent and intricacy of the repair, the materials utilized, and the property’s location. It’s recommended to obtain a quote from a reputable roofing firm to accurately determine the cost for your repair requirements.

The cost of repairs may vary, so it’s advisable to find a company that can accommodate your budget. Get in touch with us today.

Get a quote

Our roofing company not only specializes in regular roofing projects but also in handling insurance claims. We are equipped to assist you with the insurance process and make sure that your roof repair is covered, be it due to natural calamities or regular wear and tear.

With a wealth of experience and knowledge, our team works seamlessly with insurance adjusters to maximize your insurance coverage for the repairs. So, when you require a new roof or need to file a claim, we are here to support you at every stage.

Contact
  • EMERGENCY STORM AND WATER DAMAGE REPAIRS
  • ROOF RESTORATION
  • ROOF GUTTER REPAIR AND CLEANING
  • TOTAL PRESSURE CLEANING
  • RE-POINTING & REBEDDING RIDGES & GABLES
  • REPAIRING OR REPLACING FLASHINGS
  • WATERPROOFING & PLUMBING
  • TILE REPLACEMENT
  • REPAIRING WATER LEAKS
  • REPAIRING AND REPLACING VALLEYS

Our team is available 24/7 for emergency roof repair services and will respond quickly to ensure your property is protected.

The time required for a roof installation varies based on the size and complexity of the project. Our team will provide an estimated timeline during the consultation process.

Do you Have Any Questions?

At Sydney Roofing Specialists, we are here to help. Contact us today and one of our friendly team members will be in touch to guide you through the process of securing a top-quality roof for your property. Don’t wait, reach out to Sydney Roofing Specialists now.

  • info@sydneyroofingspecialists.com
  • 0427 364 223

Contact Us

# Sydney Roofing Specialists

With a team of experienced and knowledgeable roofing experts, our company offers high-quality services such as roof repair, replacement, maintenance, and installation. Available 24 hours for all emergency services.

![](https://sydneyroofingspecialists.com//wp-content/uploads/2023/02/srs-google-rating.png)

[Call 0427 364 223](tel:0427364223)

###### **our services**

## All services we offer

![](https://sydneyroofingspecialists.com//wp-content/uploads/2023/02/water-damage-300x300-1.jpg)

**EMERGENCY STORM AND WATER DAMAGE REPAIRS**

**ROOF**

**RESTORATION**

![](https://sydneyroofingspecialists.com//wp-content/uploads/2023/02/gutter-repair-and-cleaning-300x300-1.jpg)

![](https://sydneyroofingspecialists.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/skylight-repairs-and-replacements.jpg)

**SKYLIGHT REPAIRS & REPLACEMENTS**

![](https://sydneyroofingspecialists.com//wp-content/uploads/2023/02/ridges-300x300-1.jpg)

**RE-POINTING & REBEDDING RIDGES & GABLES**

![](https://sydneyroofingspecialists.com//wp-content/uploads/2023/02/flashings-300x300-1.jpg)

**REPAIRING OR REPLACING FLASHINGS**

![](https://sydneyroofingspecialists.com//wp-content/uploads/2023/02/waterproofing-300x300-1.jpg)

**WATERPROOFING**

![](https://sydneyroofingspecialists.com//wp-content/uploads/2023/02/srs-services-300x300-1.jpg)

**TILE**

**REPLACEMENT**

![](https://sydneyroofingspecialists.com//wp-content/uploads/2023/02/water-leaks-300x300-1.jpg)

**REPAIRING WATER LEAKS**

![](https://sydneyroofingspecialists.com//wp-content/uploads/2023/02/repairing-valleys-300x300-1.jpg)

**REPAIRING AND REPLACING VALLEYS**

![](https://sydneyroofingspecialists.com//wp-content/uploads/2022/06/pexels-life-of-pix-8092.jpg)

* * *

###### About us

## Need roofing? Contact us today!

Sydney Roofing Specialists serves as a leading roofing company in the Sydney metropolitan and surrounding areas. We’re a team of fully qualified, licensed and insured professionals who tackle everything from complex large projects to smaller scale jobs.

Fuelled by our commitment to excellence, we go the extra mile to make sure clients are completely satisfied with our work. Call us today to receive a quotation.

- Sydney’s most affordable roofing specialists
- The best customer service in the business
- The highest quality products

[Get a quote](https://sydneyroofingspecialists.com//?page_id=815)

* * *

###### Testimonials

## Why People are Choosing us for Their roofs

_”_ We are very happy with the work from the team at Sydney Roofing Specialists and highly recommend. Michael visited shortly after my initial call, photographed the problems on the roof that were causing our leak and quoted straight away. We accepted the quote and he returned within a week, carried out all the work quickly & professionally and showed us the photos of the work completed. Thank you!”

#### Dylan Hamilton-Foster

Sydney, NSW

“Called Michael at 9:30pm on a Wednesday night as a storm hit and left me with a leak in the roof in the main living room, Michael assured me not to worry and that he will be there within 30 minutes, got there and fixed the roof immediately and saved me a fortune! Can not recommend Michael and the team enough!”

#### Barry Matthews

Sydney, NSW

_“_ Michael and his team were professional, knowledgeable and friendly right from the beginning. We are very pleased with the roof repair completed and would definitely recommend them to others. _”_

#### Marianthe Ranieri

Sydney, NSW

* * *

###### main REASON Customers CHOOSE US

## Our Promise

##### Quality Workmanship

At Sydney Roofing Specialists, we are dedicated to providing top-notch roofing services and materials, ensuring a sturdy and dependable roof for your home.

##### Timely Completion

We strive to complete each project efficiently while adhering to the highest safety and cleanliness standards. Trust SRS for a prompt and hassle-free roofing experience.

##### Customer Satisfaction

Our goal is to consistently meet and surpass customer expectations through excellent service, clear communication, and reasonable pricing.

* * *

###### FAQ

## let’s build something together

Our professional roofing team consists of skilled and seasoned experts who have the capability to tackle any roofing project, regardless of its size. We use only premium-grade materials and stay abreast of the latest industry methods to guarantee that your roof is durable. Our team takes great pride in their work, which reflects in the quality of the final product.

[Contact us](https://sydneyroofingspecialists.com/#contact-us)

How much will it cost?

The expenses incurred for roof repair vary due to multiple factors such as the extent and intricacy of the repair, the materials utilized, and the property’s location. It’s recommended to obtain a quote from a reputable roofing firm to accurately determine the cost for your repair requirements.

The cost of repairs may vary, so it’s advisable to find a company that can accommodate your budget. Get in touch with us today.

[Get a quote](https://sydneyroofingspecialists.com//?page_id=815)

Do you take insurance claims?

Our roofing company not only specializes in regular roofing projects but also in handling insurance claims. We are equipped to assist you with the insurance process and make sure that your roof repair is covered, be it due to natural calamities or regular wear and tear.

With a wealth of experience and knowledge, our team works seamlessly with insurance adjusters to maximize your insurance coverage for the repairs. So, when you require a new roof or need to file a claim, we are here to support you at every stage.

[Contact](https://sydneyroofingspecialists.com/#contact-us)

What services does Sydney Roofing Specialists offer?

- EMERGENCY STORM AND WATER DAMAGE REPAIRS
- ROOF RESTORATION
- ROOF GUTTER REPAIR AND CLEANING
- TOTAL PRESSURE CLEANING
- RE-POINTING & REBEDDING RIDGES & GABLES
- REPAIRING OR REPLACING FLASHINGS
- WATERPROOFING & PLUMBING
- TILE REPLACEMENT
- REPAIRING WATER LEAKS
- REPAIRING AND REPLACING VALLEYS

How do you handle emergency roof repair services?

Our team is available 24/7 for emergency roof repair services and will respond quickly to ensure your property is protected.

How long does a roof installation typically take?

The time required for a roof installation varies based on the size and complexity of the project. Our team will provide an estimated timeline during the consultation process.

## Do you Have Any Questions?

At Sydney Roofing Specialists, we are here to help. Contact us today and one of our friendly team members will be in touch to guide you through the process of securing a top-quality roof for your property. Don’t wait, reach out to Sydney Roofing Specialists now.

- [info@sydneyroofingspecialists.com](mailto:info@sydneyroofingspecialists.com)
- [0427 364 223](tel:0427364223)
